text: hey you left a jacket at the house, want me to mail it or drop it when i'm near charlotte
oh the green one? mail it whenever, no rush
yeah green one. i'll box it up this week
thanks jordan. hope work's good
busy, deck build in apex. take care
cuz you still doing that lie-nielsen jointer thing or you cave and buy the cheap one
still saving. tools fund's slow but i'm not buying junk
respect. you coming down to columbia this summer?
maybe. depends on the band schedule
let me know. spare room's yours
jordan did aunt linda tell you grandma's 80th is being planned
nope first i'm hearing. when
not set yet but probably fall. mom wants everyone there
i'll be there. tell me the date once it's set
will do. how's the wrist, heard you sprained it
healed up. dumb ladder move in january
valentines and none of us have plans, sad crew
speak for yourselves lol
i've got bass practice and leftover bbq, living the dream
that actually sounds great honestly
come to a timber creek show sometime, we're at trophy in october
hey you left a jacket at the house, want me to mail it or drop it when i'm near charlotte (again)
no rush, it's hanging by the door
how's the new job going
charlotte treating you alright?
band's got a show at trophy in october if you're ever back this way
take care of yourself
cousin! you still hunting for a good jointer plane
found a No.7 deal on telegram, thinking about it
how's virginia, cold up there yet
dad said your granddad's tools might be worth restoring
send pics of that old brace next time
might drive up for the fourth if the band's not playing
happy birthday cuz
thanks for the card, kayla loved seeing you at thanksgiving
you coming to the reunion this summer
tell your mom i said hey
the walnut box you made is gorgeous, gonna commission one
how much for a jewelry box like that
family group: who's in for the fourth of july cookout
dad's smoking a brisket, bring sides
jordan's band might play if travis lands the festival slot
weather looks good so far
kayla's bringing the banana pudding
see everyone in garner
load in the coolers early
